query:
-- ยอดรวม bad_debt_amount ทั้ง 2 sections
SELECT 
  section,
  COUNT(*) as contract_count,
  SUM(bad_debt_amount) as total_bad_debt,
  AVG(bad_debt_amount) as avg_bad_debt,
  MIN(bad_debt_amount) as min_bad_debt,
  MAX(bad_debt_amount) as max_bad_debt
FROM contracts
WHERE debt_status = 'bad_debt' AND bad_debt_amount > 0
GROUP BY section;
